description: git-github-project-name returns repo name from SSH GitHub URL
steps: Create a temp git repo with remote set to git@github.com:pixelastic/testrepo.git

description: git-github-project-name returns repo name from HTTPS GitHub URL
steps: Create a temp git repo with remote set to https://github.com/pixelastic/testrepo.git

description: git-worktree-create falls back to folder name when no remote
steps: Create a temp git repo named 'myrepo' with no remote

description: git-worktree-create strips leading dots from fallback folder name
steps: Create a temp git repo in a folder named '.myrepo' with no remote
Verify worktree dir starts with 'myrepo--' (no leading dot)

description: git-worktree-create uses repo name without leading dot for directory prefix
steps: Create a temp git repo in a dot-prefixed folder (e.g. '.myrepo')
Verify the worktree directory name starts with 'myrepo--' not '.myrepo--'

description: vwc, vwl, vws, vwR, vwsm aliases exist and point to correct functions
steps: Run which vwc, vwl, vws, vwR, vwsm
Verify vwsm expands to 'vws main' or git-worktree-switch main

description: complete-git-worktrees-linked does not include 'main'
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree on fix/bug
Verify 'main' does not appear in output

description: complete-git-worktrees-linked includes linked worktree branch names
steps: Create a temp git repo with worktrees on fix/bug and feat/thing
Verify fix/bug and feat/thing appear in output

description: complete-git-worktrees-linked returns empty when no worktrees exist
steps: Create a temp git repo with no linked worktrees

description: git-worktree-distance returns ahead count vs main
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Add 2 commits in the worktree branch

description: git-worktree-distance returns behind count vs main
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Add 3 commits to main after the worktree was branched

description: git-worktree-distance returns ahead 0 behind 0 for a fresh worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree on a new branch (no commits)

description: git-worktree-list marks the current worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with two linked worktrees
cd into one of the worktrees
Verify the current worktree line contains the pointer marker

description: git-worktree-list shows ahead count vs main
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Verify the output contains '2' in the ahead/behind column

description: git-worktree-list shows behind count vs main
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Add 3 commits to main after the worktree was created
Verify the output contains '3' in the behind column for that worktree

description: git-worktree-list shows relative date of last commit
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree that has a commit
Verify the output contains a relative time string (e.g. 'seconds ago')

description: git-worktree-list shows last commit message
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree
Make a commit with message 'my test commit'
Verify 'my test commit' appears in the output

description: GIT_DIRECTORY_IS_WORKTREE is 1 inside a linked worktree
steps: Create a temp git repo with a linked worktree

description: GIT_DIRECTORY_IS_WORKTREE is 0 in the Git Repo Main
git-worktree-project returns the project name when in a worktree of a known project
steps: Set up a known project entry in PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH pointing to a temp git repo
Add a linked worktree from that repo
Verify output matches the project name

description: git-worktree-project returns empty string when project is not registered
steps: Create a temp git repo not registered in PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH

description: git-worktree-create runs yarn install when yarn.lock is present
steps: Create a temp git repo with a minimal package.json and a yarn.lock
Verify node_modules/ exists in the new worktree

description: git-worktree-create does not run yarn install when yarn.lock is absent
steps: Create a temp git repo with no yarn.lock
Verify node_modules/ does not exist in the new worktree

description: oroshi-prompt-populate:path shows project prefix when in worktree of registered project
steps: Create a temp git repo registered in PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH

description: oroshi-prompt-populate:path shows plain path in worktree of unregistered project
steps: Create a temp git repo not registered in PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH
Verify OROSHI_PROMPT_PARTS[path] contains worktree directory name

description: oroshi-prompt-populate:path shows path relative to worktree root after prefix
steps: Create a temp git repo registered in PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH
Add a linked worktree with a src/ subdirectory
Verify output contains 'src' but not the worktree directory name

description: oroshi-prompt-populate:path behaviour unchanged outside worktrees
steps: Create a temp git repo registered in PROJECTS_INDEX_BY_PATH

description: git_worktree_branch shows leaf icon inside a worktree
git_worktree_branch icon uses WORKTREE color when 0 commits ahead
steps: cd into a fresh linked worktree (0 commits ahead of main)

description: git_worktree_branch icon uses TRACKED color when worktree has commits ahead
steps: cd into a worktree, add 1 commit

description: git_branch prompt part is empty when inside a worktree
git_worktree_branch is empty outside a worktree
steps: cd into the Git Repo Main
